candidates.why: Explicit D&A line appears below gross profit among operating expenses, not within or alongside the selected COGS line above gross profit. It therefore does not clearly relate to the selected COGS bucket.
Explicit amortization line appears below gross profit among operating expenses, separate from the selected COGS line. It does not appear to be COGS-specific.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is [Income Statement] Cost of Revenues/COGS. The visible D&A rows are separate operating-expense lines below gross profit, so they do not appear to be COGS-related D&A that should be added to the selected COGS bucket.

candidates.why: This is a populated summary depreciation row above EBIT and at the same operating-expense level as the selected XSGA component rows. It appears separate from the selected XSGA rows, so it should be added separately. It also summarizes the more granular depreciation component rows, avoiding double counting.

This is a populated summary amortization row above EBIT and separate from the selected XSGA component rows. It appears to summarize the underlying amortization component rows, so the summary row should be used to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets
candidates.why: Looks like a component of the populated summary row 'Depreciation' because the summary equals the sum of the component depreciation rows in shown years.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Licenses, Copyrights, Property Rights & Designs
candidates.why: Looks like a component of the populated summary row 'Amortization' because the summary closely equals the sum of the component amortization rows in shown years.
Looks like a component of the populated summary row 'Amortization' because the summary closely equals the sum of the component amortization rows in shown years.

variables.notes: Manually changed. Selected XSGA reference bucket is the combined set of [Income Statement] Operating cost and [Income Statement] Payroll expense. The D&A rows are shown separately at the same operating section level rather than as sub-components of those selected rows, so they should be added separately. Chose only the populated summary rows 'Depreciation' and 'Amortization' rather than their components to avoid double counting. XRD is empty, so there is no separate R&D row interaction to adjust for.
